subcodes.first_line: Blessed is the soul who, in this dark day when the fire of the oppressors' self is ablaze, is illumined by the lights of dawn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی از برای نفسیکه در این یوم ظلمانی که نار نفس ظالمین مشتعل است بانوار فجر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
